assertions.title: Prepare Selected acts only on the current manual selection

steps.action: Open candidate review from a creator-profile intake and manually select two rows
steps.expected: Only the chosen candidates are included in the pending prepare action
steps.observed: Selected 旅行Vlog | 周末短途游 and 新品开箱｜这款相机太惊艳了！; CTA updated to Prepare Selected (2) while six other discovered rows stayed unselected.

steps.expected: The app advances only the selected items into preparation
steps.observed: Navigated to /sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc/preparation showing exactly two preparation items matching the selected titles.

steps.action: Inspect prepare request payload and resulting session data
steps.expected: POST /api/sessions/[sessionId]/prepare is scoped to the selected item ids and leaves other discovered items outside the preparation set
steps.observed: POST /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc/prepare returned preparedIds [item_8a54ee1d1af66136226c69d5, item_8d926cc24e97f7cfaec59580]; session.selectedIds contained only those two ids while the other six candidates remained prepStatus=pending.

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc/prepare -> 200 with preparedIds [item_8a54ee1d1af66136226c69d5, item_8d926cc24e97f7cfaec59580]; GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc showed six unselected candidates still at prepStatus=pending.

assertions.title: Profile-based preparation starts only for selected items

steps.action: Prepare two selected items from the creator candidate review
steps.expected: Preparation page renders status rows only for the selected subset
steps.observed: Preparation page header showed Preparing 2 items and rendered rows only for 旅行Vlog | 周末短途游 and 新品开箱｜这款相机太惊艳了！.

steps.action: Compare preparation UI to full session candidate list
steps.expected: Unselected discovered candidates are not turned into preparation entries
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc contained eight candidates total, but only the two selected ids were ready/prepared and visible on the preparation page; the other six remained pending and absent from the preparation list.

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc/prepare -> 200; subsequent GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc showed selectedIds limited to the two prepared items and all other candidates still pending.

assertions.title: Preparation page renders only the supported lifecycle statuses

steps.action: Inspect the preparation summary counters and item rows after preparation
steps.expected: Visible statuses use only the supported lifecycle values pending/downloading/transcribing/ready/failed
steps.observed: The summary rendered 0 pending, 0 downloading, 0 transcribing, 2 ready, 0 failed, and each visible item row was labeled Ready.

steps.action: Inspect session payload for item statuses
steps.expected: Returned status values stay within the supported V1 lifecycle set
steps.observed: Session API showed prepStatus values of ready for the two prepared items and pending for the remaining six candidates; no unsupported or ambiguous status label appeared in the UI or payload.

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc -> prepStatus values limited to pending and ready; preparation UI counters used the supported labels pending/downloading/transcribing/ready/failed.

assertions.title: Each preparation item shows independent state

steps.action: Open the preparation page for the two selected items
steps.expected: Each preparation item displays its own title and current status
steps.observed: The page showed separate rows for 旅行Vlog | 周末短途游 and 新品开箱｜这款相机太惊艳了！, each with its own artifact paths, Ready label, and Open Studio action.

steps.action: Check that items can be distinguished independently
steps.expected: Operator can tell which title belongs to which current state
steps.observed: Both rows remained visually distinct with per-item titles and status badges, confirming item-level independent state presentation.

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc returned per-item prepStatus values for each selected id, matching the separate rows shown in the UI.

assertions.title: Ready state is restored from persisted local outputs after refresh

steps.action: Capture the preparation page when both selected items are ready
steps.expected: Ready state is visible before refresh
steps.observed: Before reload, both selected items showed Ready with local video/transcript artifact paths.

steps.expected: Ready items stay ready after refresh instead of resetting to an in-progress state
steps.observed: After reload, the page still showed Preparing 2 items with 2 ready and 0 pending/downloading/transcribing/failed; both rows remained Ready with the same artifact paths and Open Studio links.

steps.expected: Persisted outputs restore ready state on GET after refresh
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc after reload continued to return prepStatus=ready plus artifact paths for both prepared ids.

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_35de08157871f2d4eaefb8dc before and after refresh returned both prepared items with prepStatus=ready and persisted artifact paths.

frictions.description: The validator prompt referenced /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md, but that file was not present on disk.
frictions.resolution: Used the mission AGENTS.md testing guidance plus the validation contract and existing flow report examples instead.

frictions.description: agent-browser's built-in network log did not retain the app requests for this session.
frictions.resolution: Captured network evidence with direct curl requests against the same session endpoints after reproducing the browser flow.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The creator flow prepared only the two manually selected candidates, the preparation page showed only supported status labels and distinct per-item rows, and both ready items stayed ready after refresh from persisted local outputs.
